nasb.text: And the Lord has sent to you all His servants the prophets again and again, but you have not listened nor inclined your ear to hear,

esv.text: You have neither listened nor inclined your ears to hear, although the Lord  persistently sent to you all his servants the prophets,

cnv.text: 耶和華雖然不斷差遣他的僕人眾先知到你們那裡去；但你們卻沒有聽從，毫不留心。

ccb.text: 耶和华屡次差遣祂的仆人——众先知警告你们，你们却充耳不闻，毫不理会。
